zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Heries於大約1428年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾霍利其時，她的父親Philip Harris29歲，母親Mary Ann Marshall29歲。她於1445年與Richard Peniston在英國巴金哈姆爾霍利其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年在英國享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Heries于大约1428年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾霍利其时，她的父亲Philip Harris29岁，母亲Mary Ann Marshall29岁。她于1445年与Richard Peniston在英国巴金哈姆爾霍利其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年在英国享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of the personal name   Herman  . This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).
French (Hermès): topographic name for someone who lived in a deserted spot or on a patch of waste land, from Occitan erm ‘desert, waste’ (from Greek erēmia) + the topographic suffix -ès.

French (Hermès): in some cases, possibly also from the personal name Hermès, from Greek Hermēs, the name of a Greek god and also of a Christian saint mentioned briefly in Paul's Epistle to the Romans.

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermesch
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Hermes  .

variants.name: Herms
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Hermes  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Heries was born about 1428, in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Philip Harris, was 29 and her mother, Mary Ann Marshall, was 29. She married Richard Peniston in 1445, in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1506, in England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Heries est née environ 1428, à Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Harris, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Ann Marshall, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Peniston en 1445, à Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1506, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Heries um 1428 in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Harris 29 und ihre Mutter Mary Ann Marshall 29. Sie hat 1445 in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England Richard Peniston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1506 im Alter von 79 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Heries è nata il circa 1428 nel Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Philip Harris, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mary Ann Marshall, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard Peniston nel 1445, nel Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1506, nel England, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Heries(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 벅잉함실르 호리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Harris(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Ann Marshall(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 벅잉함실르 호리지에서 Richard Peniston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 영국에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Heries родилась около 1428 г. в местности харидж, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Harris было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ann Marshall, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Peniston в 1445 г. в местности харидж, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1506 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Heries nació aproximadamente 1428, en Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Harris, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary Ann Marshall, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard Peniston en 1445, en Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1506, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
